title: ficus simplicissima var. roxburghii
intro: Ficus simplicissima var. roxburghii, also known as the Roxburgh's ficus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Moraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits associated with Ficus simplicissima var. roxburghii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Ficus simplicissima var. roxburghii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
